title: 10th Anniversary EVA Panel at Anime Weekend Atlanta
display_title: 10th Anniversary EVA Panel at Anime Weekend Atlanta
wikitext:
[]: 10th Anniversary EVA Panel at Anime Weekend Atlanta             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Wed Sep 14, 2005 12:46 pm This may be your last chance to attend a 10th Anniversary EVA Panel before you have to start attending the inevitable 11th Anniversary EVA Panels in next year's con season. Which will probably be larger panels, owing to the October premiere on Adult Swim, so get in your questions now. You'll hear many informative answers such as, "It's by Umberto Eco. U-M-B-E-R-T-O. No, not like 'echo'" "Did I mention I really like Nirvana?" "What color is Eva Unit-01? I dunno...ask Reichu...Reichu knows all that detail stuff." I will, by the way, be passing out flyers promoting EvaMonkey, EvaCommentary, and GainaxPages. I may even give out some Eva Calbee chips, if someone is willing to eat them on the spot. In any case there will be the usual manga-related prizes. Also, please feel free to swing by my party at AWA. â€”C.

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Wed Sep 14, 2005 1:29 pm Oh great. I was hoping you'd be attending the Otakon panel. Now I get to miss your panel at ACEN and AWA. :? I wonder if I can figure out a way to squeeze this Con in...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Sep 14, 2005 9:31 pm Damn... I think another "Otaku no Roadtrip" is in order...

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Wed Sep 14, 2005 10:00 pm Well, I just finished booking my flight, hotel, and car for the event. I probably shouldn't be going considering other higher priorities in my life right now but I only live once (I think). I figure I should finish off the con tour this year strongly. Boston, NJ, Baltimore, and now Atlanta. I'm looking forward to meeting you Carl. If you do make it down EM, it will be good to see you again. Do you have the date and time set for the panel yet? I'd also like to stop by your party too. Should I PM you for details?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Sep 15, 2005 1:33 am Carl Gustav Horn Almighty wrote: I will, by the way, be passing out flyers promoting EvaMonkey, EvaCommentary, and GainaxPages.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Sep 15, 2005 3:36 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Damn... I think another "Otaku no Roadtrip" is in order...

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Thu Sep 15, 2005 9:12 am Reichu wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Damn... I think another "Otaku no Roadtrip" is in order...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Sep 15, 2005 9:51 am Digitalex wrote: Live a little Reichu. It's not like he does this every week.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Thu Sep 15, 2005 10:00 am Reichu wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Damn... I think another "Otaku no Roadtrip" is in order...

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Thu Sep 15, 2005 11:46 am Reichu wrote: "Roadtrip"? With the price of gasoline right now? Are you insane?

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Thu Sep 15, 2005 12:56 pm Titus wrote: Reichu wrote: "Roadtrip"? With the price of gasoline right now? Are you insane?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 15, 2005 3:02 pm Titus wrote: Typical Americans.. The price for gas is 6 times higher here, as is everything else than it is stateside, and you complain if it goes up a little.. Ha!

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Sep 15, 2005 6:30 pm Right now, I'm so glad to be a spoiled child-adult who doesn't have a license or a car. (Of course the downside is that I don't have a license or a car.)

[]:             Quote Post by Vulkurt » Thu Sep 15, 2005 6:35 pm Goddamn it, goddamnit, GODDAMNIT!!! No I can't go! But, knowing Carl, it will be great.

[]: Re: 10th Anniversary EVA Panel at Anime Weekend Atlanta             Quote Post by Otaprince » Thu Sep 15, 2005 7:03 pm Carl Horn wrote: I will, by the way, be passing out flyers promoting EvaMonkey, EvaCommentary, and GainaxPages. â€”C.

[]: Re: 10th Anniversary EVA Panel at Anime Weekend Atlanta             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Thu Sep 15, 2005 7:39 pm Otaprince wrote: Carl Horn wrote: I will, by the way, be passing out flyers promoting EvaMonkey, EvaCommentary, and GainaxPages. â€”C.

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Thu Sep 15, 2005 7:44 pm Digitalex wrote: Well, I just finished booking my flight, hotel, and car for the event. I probably shouldn't be going considering other higher priorities in my life right now but I only live once (I think). I figure I should finish off the con tour this year strongly. Boston, NJ, Baltimore, and now Atlanta. I'm looking forward to meeting you Carl. If you do make it down EM, it will be good to see you again. Do you have the date and time set for the panel yet? I'd also like to stop by your party too. Should I PM you for details?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Sep 15, 2005 9:18 pm Titus wrote: Typical Americans..

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Sep 15, 2005 9:56 pm I don't drive and always take public transport, have no other choice.

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Thu Sep 15, 2005 10:48 pm Carl Horn wrote: I don't think the panel schedule has been finalized yet. The party will be either Friday or Saturday night (as opposed to what, Wednesday morning? )--look for the flyers bearing the visage of Courtney Love. â€”C.
